message:
Merge PR #2703: fix: resolve rig default_formula before falling back to mol-polecat-work

Checks the rig workflow.default_formula config setting before falling
back to the hardcoded mol-polecat-work default. Allows rigs to customize
their polecat formula without passing --formula on every sling.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2703
Author: rileywhite
